title: Property Consultant - Inorbit Malls - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Inorbit Malls - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Inorbit Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
